template<typename Stream>
Stream & operator<< (Stream &stream, setprogram const &manip)

Detailed Description

I/O manipulator to set the program.

The program is required to look up label names. A pointer to the program is contextual information stored with an output stream until cleared and is requried to stream out Node objects.
